questions.question: Why did the speaker tell them these things?
questions.answers: So that they may have peace in him.

questions.question: What can they have in the speaker (in him)?
What do they have in the world?
How should they respond despite having tribulation in the world?
What does the speaker say he has done regarding the world?
questions.answers: He has overcome/victory over the world (ἐγὼ νενίκηκα τὸν κόσμον).
